recommendations: Review and validate access control configurations
result.description: Access Card Reader. A person is holding an access card against a card reader mounted near a door. The card reader has a light indicator.
keyFindings: Digital access control system using ID/employee cards.
Automates entry tracking by time-stamping when the card is swiped.
Dependent on card validity and system integrity (e.g., cards can be lost or borrowed).
Contains access control system documentation requiring security review
May include authentication mechanisms or security procedures requiring protection
